lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real LLM-driven rework; scenarios drive the evaluator + SST-loader proofs.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': the alert-timing decision now flows through the alert_timing_evaluate scenario; TestBridgeAlertTimingEvaluator_* prove the LLM-driven path (parse, routing, public-signal forwarding, internal-field non-leak, error paths) with a scripted bridge; the SST loader tests prove fail-loud operational bounds.

scenarios.title: Alert-timing judgment routes to the LLM scenario, parses the decision, and never leaks internal fields
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: EvaluateAlertTiming routes IntentEnvelope{ScenarioID: alert_timing_evaluate}, forwards {alert_kind,subject,days_until_event,detail}, omits ArtifactID/AlertType/Priority (json:"-"), parses {should_alert,confidence,rationale}, and errors on nil runner / nil result / non-OK / empty final / bad JSON.

scenarios.title: Pure helper: the operational confidence-floor gate
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: alertTimingShouldSurface is true only when should_alert AND confidence >= floor.

scenarios.title: Operational alert-timing bounds are fail-loud SST config
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Missing/empty INTELLIGENCE_ALERT_TIMING_* keys fail loud naming the var; out-of-range values (lookahead<=0, cap<=0, floor not in [0,1]) are rejected.
